title: Gooey Citrusy Cheese Fries
description: A twist on classic cheese fries, this recipe adds a tangy citrusy flavor and a gooey cheese topping.

ingredients.name: Potatoes
ingredients.notes: Choose high-starch potatoes for crispiest results

ingredients.name: Citrusy Seasoning
ingredients.notes: Mix of citrus zest and powder

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.notes: Salted or unsalted, whichever you prefer

ingredients.name: Gooey Cheese Sauce
ingredients.notes: Homemade or store-bought, whichever suits you

ingredients.name: Shredded Cheese
ingredients.notes: Cheddar or a blend of your choice

instructions: Cut potatoes into fry shapes and soak in cold water for at least 30 minutes.
Drain potatoes and pat dry with paper towels.
Toss potatoes with citrusy seasoning and melted butter until evenly coated.
Bake potatoes in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until crispy.
Meanwhile, heat gooey cheese sauce according to package instructions.
Remove fries from the oven and sprinkle with shredded cheese.
Return fries to the oven for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
